_meta.description: Production skill recency ontology for resume feedback. Covers frontend, backend, cloud/devops, data/ML, mobile, databases, languages, testing, security, and tooling. Status values: CURRENT | ESTABLISHED | AGING | LEGACY | DEPRECATED. Staleness 0.0 (no penalty) to 1.0 (heavy penalty).

statusDefinitions.CURRENT: Actively hired for; listing is a positive signal.
statusDefinitions.ESTABLISHED: Mainstream and widely used; not a differentiator but expected.
statusDefinitions.AGING: Still used in production but demand declining; showing without modern context is a yellow flag.
statusDefinitions.LEGACY: Rarely hired for in new roles; signals outdated focus unless in legacy/CMS context.
statusDefinitions.DEPRECATED: Effectively dead; listing is a red flag in nearly all contexts.

_meta.scoringNotes: flagIfClaimedOver is the year threshold after which the claim is flagged for review. maxClaimableYears is the hard ceiling (library/language age). staleness is a 0–1 additive penalty weight used by scoring engines.

feedback.overclaimMessage: React launched in 2013 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
Next.js launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Vue.js launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
feedback.statusNote: Specify Vue 2 vs Vue 3 — the Composition API shift is significant to interviewers.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Nuxt.js launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Modern Angular (v2+) launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
feedback.statusNote: Specify the Angular version range. Angular 2+ and AngularJS (1.x) are distinct technologies.

feedback.overclaimMessage: AngularJS claimed years seem very high.
feedback.statusNote: AngularJS (1.x) reached end-of-life in December 2021. Listing it as a primary skill is a red flag. Remove or relabel as 'AngularJS (legacy migration experience)'.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Svelte launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Remix launched publicly in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Astro launched in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
SolidJS reached v1.0 in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Claimed Ember.js years seem high for current market.
feedback.statusNote: Ember has a small active niche but listing it as a primary skill suggests outdated exposure. Pair with a modern framework.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Backbone.js is effectively unmaintained.
feedback.statusNote: Backbone.js is no longer hired for in new projects. Remove unless applying for a legacy maintenance role.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Redux launched in 2015 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
feedback.statusNote: Prefer listing 'Redux Toolkit' over plain 'Redux' — interviewers expect modern patterns.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Zustand launched in 2019 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
Jotai launched in 2020 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
React Query / TanStack Query launched in 2019 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
GraphQL open-sourced in 2015 — claimed experience exceeds specification age.
Claimed jQuery experience seems high for modern frontend roles.
feedback.statusNote: Listing jQuery as a primary skill is a red flag for modern web positions. Acceptable for CMS/WordPress roles or legacy codebases.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Three.js launched in 2010 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
D3.js launched in 2011 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
Tailwind CSS launched in 2017 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
CSS Modules / styled-components emerged around 2015 — claimed experience seems high.
Claimed Sass/SCSS years seem excessive for a differentiator.
feedback.statusNote: Sass/SCSS is still widely used but native CSS features (nesting, variables, layers) are increasingly replacing it. Pair with modern CSS knowledge.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Bootstrap experience seems high for modern UI positions.
feedback.statusNote: Bootstrap remains valid for rapid prototyping and admin UIs, but Tailwind has largely displaced it in modern stacks. Specify the version.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Vite launched in 2020 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Webpack launched in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
feedback.statusNote: Webpack is widely deployed but Vite/Turbopack/Rspack are modern preferences. Pair with newer bundler knowledge.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Turbopack launched in 2022 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
esbuild launched in 2020 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Rollup launched in 2015 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Grunt/Gulp as primary tools is a significant red flag.
feedback.statusNote: Grunt and Gulp have been replaced by modern bundlers. Listing them without a modern alternative signals outdated tooling knowledge.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Node.js launched in 2009 — claimed experience exceeds runtime age.
Express.js launched in 2010 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
feedback.statusNote: Express remains ubiquitous but is considered 'table stakes'. Pair with Fastify, Hono, or NestJS for modern signal.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Fastify launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
NestJS launched in 2017 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Hono launched in 2022 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Django launched in 2005 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
FastAPI launched in 2018 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Flask launched in 2010 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
feedback.statusNote: Flask is still actively used but FastAPI is increasingly preferred for new Python APIs.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Spring Boot launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Claimed Rails years seem high — consider framing recent vs overall experience.
feedback.statusNote: Rails has a loyal niche but new Rails job postings have declined significantly. Strong for startups; less valued in enterprise-scale distributed systems roles.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Laravel launched in 2011 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Gin/Echo/Fiber frameworks emerged around 2014–2016 — check claimed years.
tRPC launched in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
ColdFusion is effectively obsolete for new development.
feedback.statusNote: ColdFusion is a significant red flag on modern resumes. Remove entirely unless the role explicitly requires ColdFusion maintenance.

feedback.overclaimMessage: TypeScript launched in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds language age.
Claimed JavaScript years exceed a typical career span — consider splitting into relevant frameworks.
feedback.statusNote: JavaScript alone is expected baseline knowledge. Differentiate with TypeScript, frameworks, or runtime expertise.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Python years exceed typical career span — consider specifying domain expertise.
Go launched publicly in 2009 — claimed experience exceeds language age.
Rust 1.0 launched in 2015 — claimed experience exceeds language age.
Claimed Java years exceed typical career span — specify version and domain.
feedback.statusNote: Specify Java version — Java 8 vs 17 vs 21 signals are very different to hiring teams.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Kotlin 1.0 launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds language age.
Swift launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds language age.
Claimed C# years seem very high — specify .NET version for context.
feedback.statusNote: Specify .NET version (Core vs 5/6/7/8/9) — it signals whether you're working in modern cross-platform .NET.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed PHP years seem high for a modern differentiator.
feedback.statusNote: PHP remains strong in CMS and e-commerce (WordPress, Magento, Laravel). Specify PHP 8.x to signal modern usage. Plain PHP without a framework is a yellow flag.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Ruby years seem high.
feedback.statusNote: Ruby demand has declined sharply outside Rails shops. Acceptable in startup contexts; less valued at scale.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Scala years seem high for current demand.
feedback.statusNote: Scala is strong in data engineering (Spark) but declining in backend web. Pair with Spark/Flink context.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Elixir launched in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds language age.
feedback.statusNote: Elixir is a niche differentiator — strong signal for concurrency-heavy roles.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Perl is effectively obsolete for new development.
feedback.statusNote: Perl is a red flag on modern resumes. Remove unless applying for a specific legacy sysadmin or bioinformatics role.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed COBOL years are plausible given its longevity.
feedback.statusNote: COBOL is a genuine niche — high demand in financial/government modernization projects. Position it as a specialization, not general development experience.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Objective-C experience seems high for modern iOS roles.
feedback.statusNote: Objective-C is a yellow flag for iOS roles — pair with Swift to signal modern capability.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed PostgreSQL years seem very high — consider framing recent vs total.
Claimed MySQL years seem very high.
feedback.statusNote: MySQL is widely deployed but PostgreSQL is increasingly preferred for new projects. Acceptable; not a differentiator.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed SQLite years seem high.
Claimed SQL Server years seem very high.
feedback.statusNote: SQL Server is strong in enterprise/Microsoft stacks. Acceptable context; specify Azure SQL if applicable.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Oracle DB years are plausible given its age.
feedback.statusNote: Oracle is a red flag for modern cloud-native roles. Acceptable in enterprise/financial where Oracle licensing is entrenched.

feedback.overclaimMessage: MongoDB launched in 2009 — claimed experience exceeds database age.
Redis launched in 2009 — claimed experience exceeds database age.
DynamoDB launched in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
Cassandra launched in 2008 — claimed experience exceeds database age.
Elasticsearch launched in 2010 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
Firestore launched in 2017 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
Claimed CouchDB years seem high for modern roles.
feedback.statusNote: CouchDB has declined significantly in new project adoption. Listing it without other databases is a yellow flag.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Pinecone launched in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
Weaviate launched in 2018 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
pgvector launched in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds extension age.
Qdrant launched in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
Chroma launched in 2022 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
AWS launched in 2006 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
feedback.statusNote: Specify key AWS services (Lambda, EKS, RDS, etc.) — 'AWS' alone is too broad to be meaningful.

feedback.overclaimMessage: GCP launched in 2008 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
feedback.statusNote: Specify key GCP services (BigQuery, GKE, Cloud Run, Vertex AI, etc.).

feedback.overclaimMessage: Azure launched in 2010 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
feedback.statusNote: Specify key Azure services (AKS, Azure Functions, Cosmos DB, etc.).

feedback.overclaimMessage: Cloudflare Workers launched in 2017 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
Vercel (as a platform) launched around 2015–2016 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
AWS Lambda launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
GitHub Actions launched in 2018 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Claimed Jenkins years seem high for modern DevOps roles.
feedback.statusNote: Jenkins is still widely deployed but signals a traditional/on-prem environment. Pair with a cloud-native CI tool to show range.

feedback.overclaimMessage: GitLab CI launched in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
CircleCI launched in 2011 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
ArgoCD launched in 2018 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Docker launched in 2013 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Kubernetes launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
OpenShift launched in 2011 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
Terraform launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Pulumi launched in 2017 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Ansible launched in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Claimed Chef/Puppet years seem high for modern IaC roles.
feedback.statusNote: Chef, Puppet, and SaltStack have been largely replaced by Terraform and Ansible in new stacks. Listing without a modern IaC tool is a yellow flag.

feedback.overclaimMessage: PyTorch launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
TensorFlow launched in 2015 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
feedback.statusNote: PyTorch has become the dominant research framework. TensorFlow remains valid for production deployment. Specify TF1 vs TF2 as they differ significantly.

feedback.overclaimMessage: scikit-learn launched in 2007 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
Hugging Face Transformers launched in 2018 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
LangChain launched in 2022 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
LlamaIndex launched in 2022 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
Apache Spark launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
dbt launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Apache Airflow launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Pandas launched in 2008 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
NumPy launched in 2005 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
Polars launched in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds library age.
OpenAI API launched publicly in 2020 — claimed experience exceeds API age.
Claude API launched in 2023 — claimed experience exceeds API age.
Prompt engineering as a discipline emerged around 2020 — claimed experience seems high.
RAG as a practical pattern emerged around 2020 — claimed experience seems high.
Fine-tuning at scale became practical around 2018–2020 — claimed experience seems high.
React Native launched in 2015 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
Flutter launched in 2018 — claimed experience exceeds framework age.
iOS SDK launched in 2008 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
feedback.statusNote: Distinguish UIKit vs SwiftUI — interviewers treat these as distinct skill sets.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Android SDK launched in 2008 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
feedback.statusNote: Distinguish XML layouts vs Jetpack Compose — modern roles prefer Compose experience.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Cordova/PhoneGap years seem high for modern mobile roles.
feedback.statusNote: Cordova/PhoneGap are effectively superseded by React Native, Flutter, and Capacitor. Listing as a primary mobile skill is a red flag.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed Xamarin years seem high for modern mobile development.
feedback.statusNote: Xamarin was deprecated in May 2024 (replaced by .NET MAUI). Update references to .NET MAUI if still in Microsoft mobile ecosystem.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Jest launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Vitest launched in 2021 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Playwright launched in 2020 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Cypress launched in 2014 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Claimed Selenium years seem high as a primary testing differentiator.
feedback.statusNote: Selenium is still widely used for cross-browser automation, but Playwright is the modern preference. Pair with Playwright or Cypress for current signal.

feedback.overclaimMessage: pytest launched in 2004 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
OAuth 2.0 RFC published in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds specification age.
JWT RFC published in 2015 — claimed experience exceeds specification age.
Zero Trust as an enterprise practice emerged around 2018-2019 — claimed experience seems high.
REST dissertation published in 2000 — claimed experience seems very high.
feedback.statusNote: REST is table-stakes knowledge. Pair with specific API design patterns, versioning strategies, or OpenAPI for differentiation.

feedback.overclaimMessage: gRPC launched in 2016 — claimed experience exceeds protocol age.
WebSockets standardized in 2011 — claimed experience exceeds specification age.
Apache Kafka launched in 2011 — claimed experience exceeds platform age.
RabbitMQ launched in 2007 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
AWS SQS launched in 2004 — claimed experience exceeds service age.
NATS launched in 2011 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Prometheus launched in 2012 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
Datadog launched in 2010 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
OpenTelemetry merged and launched in 2019 — claimed experience exceeds project age.
Claimed New Relic years seem high as a differentiator.
feedback.statusNote: New Relic is still used but has lost mindshare to Datadog and OpenTelemetry in modern stacks.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Git launched in 2005 — claimed experience exceeds tool age.
feedback.statusNote: Git is baseline expectation. Specifying GitHub/GitLab experience is more meaningful.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed SVN years seem very high.
feedback.statusNote: SVN is a red flag on modern engineering resumes. Mention only if framing as a migration (SVN → Git) experience.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Adobe Flash reached end-of-life in December 2020.
feedback.statusNote: Flash/ActionScript is a significant red flag. Remove entirely from modern resumes.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Knockout.js is effectively unmaintained since ~2017.
feedback.statusNote: Remove Knockout.js from modern resumes. It signals exposure only to legacy codebases.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Claimed SOAP experience seems high for modern API roles.
feedback.statusNote: SOAP is a yellow flag for API roles unless explicitly working with enterprise/financial SOAP integrations. Pair with REST/gRPC.

feedback.overclaimMessage: Apache Struts is effectively obsolete for new development.
feedback.statusNote: Remove Struts from modern resumes — it signals significantly dated Java web experience.
